project_type: Next.js 15 monorepo with pnpm workspaces and Turborepo
build_system: pnpm + turborepo. Build with `pnpm turbo build`, typecheck with `pnpm turbo typecheck`
verification_instructions: Run pnpm turbo typecheck for all affected apps, ensure no TS errors. Then pnpm turbo build for affected apps.
setup_instructions: Already set up. pnpm install already run. Node 22 available.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22, pnpm available.
contribution_requirements: All pages must use 'use client' directive, import from @quant/shared-ui, have loading/error/data states
key_patterns: Pages use 'use client', useState/useEffect for data fetching OR @tanstack/react-query hooks. API routes are Next.js App Router format at /api/. Pages import Card, Badge, Button from @quant/shared-ui. Loading uses <LoadingState/>, errors use <ErrorState/>. API responses follow {success: boolean, data: T, metadata?: {total, page}} format.
directory_structure: apps/ contains 17 Next.js apps. packages/ contains ~90 shared packages. Each app has src/app/ with Next.js App Router structure. API routes live in src/app/api/. The admin app has 12 pages and 11 API routes already built.
